allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\daveg\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-daveg-Documents-GitHub-mySOC-SOC-Particle\\f43a045f-e6ae-499e-966d-6264c4b93f59.jsonl" -Tail 20; $content | ForEach-Object { $obj = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($obj.type -eq "assistant"\) { Write-Output "=== ASSISTANT ==="; $obj.message.content | ForEach-Object { if \($_.type -eq "text"\) { Write-Output $_.text } } } elseif \($obj.type -eq "user"\) { Write-Output "=== USER ==="; $obj.message.content | ForEach-Object { if \($_.type -eq "text"\) { Write-Output $_.text } } } })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\daveg\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-daveg-Documents-GitHub-mySOC-SOC-Particle\\f43a045f-e6ae-499e-966d-6264c4b93f59.jsonl"; $count = $lines.Count; Write-Output "Total lines: $count"; $last30 = $lines[\($count-30\)..\($count-1\)]; foreach \($line in $last30\) { try { $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($obj.type -eq "assistant"\) { $obj.message.content | ForEach-Object { if \($_.type -eq "text" -and $_.text.Length -gt 0\) { Write-Output "=ASST= $\($_.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $_.text.Length\)\)\)" } } } elseif \($obj.type -eq "user"\) { $obj.message.content | ForEach-Object { if \($_.type -eq "text" -and $_.text.Length -gt 0\) { Write-Output "=USER= $\($_.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $_.text.Length\)\)\)" } } } } catch {} })
